title: Pip Learns to Swim
summary: Маленький утёнок Пип боится воды, но с помощью мамы учится плавать.
character: Pip is a tiny fluffy yellow duckling with a small orange beak and one little blue ribbon on his head.
style: soft warm watercolor children's picture-book illustration, rounded friendly shapes, gentle colours

pages.en: This is Pip. Pip is a little yellow duck.
pages.ru: Это Пип. Пип — маленький жёлтый утёнок.
pages.scene: A tiny fluffy yellow duckling with a small orange beak and a little blue ribbon on his head stands on the grass by a sunny pond with green reeds.

pages.en: Pip looks at the water. The water is big. Pip is afraid.
pages.ru: Пип смотрит на воду. Вода большая. Пипу страшно.
pages.scene: The tiny yellow duckling with a blue ribbon on his head stands at the edge of the pond, looking at the big water with wide scared eyes, reeds and a sunny sky behind him.

pages.en: Mum is here. "Come, Pip," says Mum. "The water is good."
pages.ru: Мама здесь. «Иди сюда, Пип», — говорит мама. «Вода хорошая».
pages.scene: A gentle mother duck swims in the pond and smiles at the tiny yellow duckling with a blue ribbon on his head, who stands on the grassy bank by the sunny reeds.

pages.en: Pip puts one foot in the water. "Oh! It is cold," says Pip.
pages.ru: Пип ставит одну лапку в воду. «Ой! Холодно», — говорит Пип.
pages.scene: The tiny yellow duckling with a blue ribbon on his head dips one little orange foot into the edge of the sunny pond, with reeds around him.

pages.en: Pip tries to swim. But Pip goes down. "Help!" says Pip.
pages.ru: Пип пытается плыть. Но Пип идёт ко дну. «Помогите!» — говорит Пип.
pages.scene: The tiny yellow duckling with a blue ribbon on his head splashes in the pond water, looking worried, with little splashes around him and reeds in the sunny background.

pages.en: "Try again, Pip!" says Mum. "I am here. You can do it."
pages.ru: «Попробуй ещё раз, Пип!» — говорит мама. «Я рядом. У тебя получится».
pages.scene: The mother duck swims close to the tiny yellow duckling with a blue ribbon on his head, gently helping him stay on the sunny pond water near the reeds.

pages.en: Pip moves his feet. One, two, one, two. Pip swims! Pip can swim!
pages.ru: Пип двигает лапками. Раз, два, раз, два. Пип плывёт! Пип умеет плавать!
pages.scene: The tiny yellow duckling with a blue ribbon on his head swims happily on the sunny pond, paddling his orange feet, with his proud mother duck beside him and reeds around.

pages.en: Pip is happy. "I love the water!" says Pip. Mum is happy too.
pages.ru: Пип счастлив. «Я люблю воду!» — говорит Пип. Мама тоже счастлива.
pages.scene: The tiny yellow duckling with a blue ribbon on his head swims joyfully next to his smiling mother duck on the sunny pond, with green reeds and a warm bright sky.
